name: Alibaba Marketplace Reference
description: A high-density B2B sourcing marketplace system inspired by Alibaba.com public pages, with orange commerce accents, large search and RFQ flows, category grids, supplier/product cards, buyer protection cues, and AI sourcing agent patterns.

en.name: Alibaba Marketplace Reference
en.description: A high-density B2B sourcing marketplace system inspired by Alibaba.com public pages, with orange commerce accents, large search and RFQ flows, category grids, supplier/product cards, buyer protection cues, and AI sourcing agent patterns.

zh-CN.name: 阿里巴巴市场参考
zh-CN.description: 受 Alibaba.com 公开页面启发的高密度 B2B 采购市场系统，包含橙色商业强调色、大型搜索与询盘流程、类目网格、供应商和商品卡片、买家保障提示以及 AI 采购代理模式。
